sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ طَائِرٌ أَزْرَقُ يَحِبُّ الْغِنَاءَ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Bila je plava ptica koja je voljela pjevati svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: There was a blue bird who loved to sing every morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ سُكَّانُ الْقَرْيَةِ يَسْتَيْقِظُونَ عَلَى صَوْتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici sela su se budili na zvuk njenog pjeva.
sentences.translationEn: The village residents would wake up to its sound.

sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمٍ مُمْطِرٍ سَكَتَ الطَّائِرُ وَاشْتَاقَ إِلَيْهِ النَّاسُ.
sentences.translation: Kišnog dana ptica je ušutjela i narodu je nedostajala.
sentences.translationEn: On a rainy day the bird fell silent and people missed it.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ خَرَجَتِ الشَّمْسُ غَنَّى الطَّائِرُ مِنْ جَدِيدٍ وَفَرِحَ الْجَمِيعُ.
sentences.translation: Kad je izašlo sunce, ptica je ponovo zapjevala i svi su se obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: When the sun came out the bird sang again and everyone was happy.
